messages.author: Maveric
messages.text: there should be a configurable parameter on repeaters that allows repeats of each message. As we move down to higher speeds and lower SF its common to see nodes miss messages and it would be nice to configure more than a single repeat per message. In this case it could be a value from 1 to 3. 1 being the default and the normal operation as it is today. But when its 2 or 3 it will repeat each message 2 or 3 times spread out over some random time/AF. Since this is a per repeater setting it could be used in certain problematic areas of a mesh to help those areas until more repeaters help fill out the density to help with delivery.

Since this is a per repeater setting it could be used in certain problematic areas of a mesh to help those areas until more repeaters help fill out the density to help with delivery.
